differentials.name: Precise tumor location (a)  transverse: medullary, cortical, juxtacortical (b)  longitudinal: epi-, meta-, diaphyseal
differentials.raw: Precise tumor location (a)  transverse: medullary, cortical, juxtacortical (b)  longitudinal: epi-, meta-, diaphyseal

differentials.name: Pattern of bone destruction / aggressiveness (a)  nonaggressive
differentials.raw: Pattern of bone destruction / aggressiveness (a)  nonaggressive

context: A systematic approach is imperative for assessment of a bone tumor with attention to size, number, and location of lesions; margins and zone of transition; periosteal reaction; matrix mineralization; soft-tissue component. √  well-defined sharp margins √  smooth solid-appearing periosteal reaction (b)  aggressive infiltrative osseous process √  broad zone of transition √  poorly defined borders √  disrupted / "sunburst" appearance DDx:   destructive metabolic / infectious process √  "rings-and-arcs" appearance = chondral origin √  opaque cloud-like matrix = osseous mineralization √  osteolytic
